Dear Sir or Madam,

I am writing to lodge a complaint regarding one of your students breaching academic integrity on ‘SHDH2035 Hong Kong Society’ from 2019-2020 semester two.

I understand that HKCC has always upheld the principles of academic integrity. However, a student from last semester was found out to have hire a group of 'so-called professional writers' to complete his/her assignment for the course of SHDH2036, with an attached proof of photo showing the conversation between the student buyer and the ‘professional writer(s)’. - The photo showed the assignment was handed in on May 2020 with 3% similarity rate at 21:21(perhaps one of possible delivery onto Turnitin system).

Although a new semester has begun, I strongly believe it would be unfair and unjust for other hardworking students of the SHDH2035 concerned there was a potential work of plagiarism in this course. Therefore, I am wishing to draw your serious attention and request an investigation into this matter so as to ensure fairness and to protect academic integrity.

* Attached link is the Instagram account of ‘professional writer(s)’: https://www.instagram.com/homework.killer/

* The attached photo was removed yesterday

I am looking forward to your response and follow-up action.

Best,
